chapter_title.en: The Ninety-Seventh Assembly, the Assembly of Thursday, Eleven Nights Remain From Sha`ban, 368 AH, in the Mashhad of Our Master Abi'l Hasan `Ali b. Musa al-Rida (as)

text: وصلى الله على محمد المصطفى وعلي المرتضى وفاطمة الزهراء والائمة من ولدها الاخيار، آل يس الابرار، وسلم تسليما كثيرا

en.bilal-muhammad: May Allah bless Muhammad the Chosen One, `Ali the one He is pleased with, Fatima the Radiant, the Chosen Imams from her descendants, the Goodly Family of Yasin, and grant them much peace.
